mode_profile.name: Server Mode Profile
mode_profile.info: Choose one dedicated profile. Survival writes UDKSurvival.ini. CnC and AOW write the RenX CnC-class section. AOW is a CnC-class rules preset, not a separate Totem Arts game class.

map.name: Starting Map
map.info: Use a CNC map for CnC/AOW or DEF-DarkNight/DEF-HillSide for Survival. Enter the map name without .udk.

map_cycle_class.name: Map Cycle Class
map_cycle_class.info: Use Rx_Game for CnC or AOW. Use Rx_Game_Survival for Survival.

map_rotation.name: Map Rotation
map_rotation.info: Comma-separated maps without .udk. Keep each server mode-only: do not mix DEF maps with CNC maps.

server_password.name: Server Password
server_password.info: Optional join password. Blank means public access.

listed.name: List Server
listed.info: Allows public listing when the server is exposed and its ports are reachable.

enable_steam.name: Enable Steam
enable_steam.info: Keeps the Steam online subsystem available.

vote_fixed_rotation.name: Force Fixed Rotation
vote_fixed_rotation.info: Disables normal map-vote selection and follows the configured rotation.

vote_max_choices.name: Map Vote Choices
vote_max_choices.info: Maximum map choices shown in a vote.

vote_recent_exclude.name: Recently Played Maps Excluded
vote_recent_exclude.info: Number of recently played maps removed from the next vote.

vote_duration.name: Map Vote Duration Seconds
vote_duration.info: Time players have to vote for the next map.

vote_change_map_lockout.name: Change Map Vote Lockout Seconds
vote_change_map_lockout.info: Time after match start before change-map voting becomes available.

vote_admins_start.name: Admins Can Start Map Votes
vote_admins_start.info: Allows administrators to initiate a map vote where supported.

vote_bots_disabled.name: Ignore Bot Votes
vote_bots_disabled.info: Prevents bots from affecting map votes.

vote_remove_variants.name: Remove Map Variants From Vote
vote_remove_variants.info: Reduces duplicate map variants in the vote list where supported.

cnc_time_limit.name: CnC Time Limit Minutes
cnc_time_limit.info: 0 disables the CnC match time limit.

cnc_team_mode.name: Team Organization
cnc_team_mode.info: 0 static, 1 swap, 2 random swap, 3 shuffle, 4 traditional, 5 unrestricted traditional, 6 random shuffle/scramble.

cnc_crate_respawn.name: Crate Respawn Seconds
cnc_crate_respawn.info: Delay after a crate is collected.

cnc_donation_lockout.name: Donation Lockout Seconds
cnc_donation_lockout.info: Time before players can donate credits.

cnc_reserve_vehicles.name: Reserve Vehicles To Buyer
cnc_reserve_vehicles.info: Protects a purchased vehicle from immediate theft.

cnc_max_cp.name: Maximum Command Points
cnc_max_cp.info: Maximum CP a team can bank.

cnc_buildings_revive.name: Buildings Can Revive
cnc_buildings_revive.info: Allows destroyed buildings to revive where the current RenX build supports it.

cnc_building_revive_time.name: Building Revive Seconds
cnc_building_revive_time.info: Delay before a revived building can return.

cnc_structures_auto_revive.name: Automatically Revive Structures
cnc_structures_auto_revive.info: Automatically restores structures rather than requiring the relevant in-game mechanic.

cnc_airdrops.name: Enable Vehicle Airdrops
cnc_airdrops.info: AOW defaults this on; standard CnC defaults it off.

cnc_overtime.name: Enable Overtime
cnc_overtime.info: Enables overtime when the regular CnC time limit expires.

cnc_points_to_win_by.name: Points To Win By
cnc_points_to_win_by.info: Score-lead threshold used by the current RenX build.

cnc_surrender_lockout.name: Surrender Lockout Seconds
cnc_surrender_lockout.info: Time after round start before surrender voting becomes available.

cnc_fill_bots.name: Fill Empty Slots With Bots
cnc_fill_bots.info: AOW defaults this on; standard CnC defaults it off.

cnc_bots_disabled.name: Disable Bots
cnc_bots_disabled.info: Disables normal CnC/AOW bots. This does not disable Survival wave enemies.

survival_min_players.name: Minimum Players
survival_min_players.info: Minimum players only when Survival wait-for-players is enabled.

survival_wait_for_players.name: Wait For Minimum Players
survival_wait_for_players.info: Keep off for public Survival so one player can start.

survival_donation_lockout.name: Donation Lockout Seconds
survival_donation_lockout.info: Time before credit donations are allowed.

survival_reserve_vehicles.name: Reserve Vehicles To Buyer
survival_reserve_vehicles.info: Reserves purchased vehicles for their buyer.

survival_start_delay.name: First Wave Delay Seconds
survival_start_delay.info: Delay before the fixed five-second first-wave countdown.

survival_wave_grace.name: Wave Grace Seconds
survival_wave_grace.info: Recovery time after clearing a wave, before the fixed five-second countdown.

survival_max_active_enemies.name: Maximum Active Enemies
survival_max_active_enemies.info: Concurrent enemy cap. 0 removes the cap and is not recommended.

survival_wave_credits.name: Base Wave Credits
survival_wave_credits.info: Base credits multiplied by wave number and defense bonus.

survival_frustration_enabled.name: Enable Adaptive Frustration
survival_frustration_enabled.info: Adaptive difficulty that can trigger punitive events when the team is doing too well.

survival_frustration_cooldown.name: Cool-Off Seconds
survival_frustration_cooldown.info: Cooldown after a successful punitive event.

survival_frustration_failure.name: Vent Failure Chance
survival_frustration_failure.info: Higher values make punitive vent attempts fail more often.

survival_frustration_start_wave.name: Passive Buildup Starts Wave
survival_frustration_start_wave.info: Wave where passive frustration buildup begins.

survival_frustration_buildup.name: Passive Buildup Multiplier
survival_frustration_buildup.info: How quickly frustration rises during active waves.

survival_frustration_cooldown_mult.name: Cool-Off Reduction Multiplier
survival_frustration_cooldown_mult.info: How quickly frustration falls during cooldown.

survival_frustration_inf_kill.name: Infantry Kill Frustration
survival_frustration_inf_kill.info: Meter increase per enemy infantry killed.

survival_frustration_veh_kill.name: Vehicle Kill Frustration
survival_frustration_veh_kill.info: Meter increase per enemy vehicle killed.

survival_frustration_player_death.name: Player Death Relief
survival_frustration_player_death.info: Meter reduction when an enemy kills a player.

survival_frustration_good_clear.name: Great/Perfect Clear Increase
survival_frustration_good_clear.info: Meter increase after a very strong wave clear.

survival_frustration_weak_clear.name: Weak Clear Reduction
survival_frustration_weak_clear.info: Meter reduction after a weaker survival result.
